headline: Alaska Air (ALK) Adds Cargo Freighters And Replaces Hawaiian Island Fleet
summary: Alaska Air Group (NYSE:ALK) plans to replace Hawaiian Airlines’ Neighbor Island fleet with Boeing 737-800 aircraft. The company is also expanding its cargo operations with additional Boeing Converted Freighters. These operational changes focus on regional passenger service in Hawaii and cargo capacity across Alaska Air’s network. Alaska Air Group sits at the intersection of passenger and cargo air travel, with NYSE:ALK drawing attention whenever it reshapes its fleet. The decision to...

headline: IBM buys HRL Laboratories in shift to two-track quantum computing strategy
summary: IBM has agreed to buy HRL Laboratories, a private quantum computing research lab jointly owned by Boeing Co and General Motors, the ‌company said on Thursday, adding a second pillar to IBM's quantum computing efforts.  IBM has been racing ‌against Alphabet's Google, Microsoft and others to create practical quantum machines that can crack problems that would take conventional computers thousands ​of years to solve.  In May, U.S. President Donald Trump's administration said it would award $1 billion to IBM to set up a new company called Anderon in New Albany, New York, to serve as a chip factory for U.S. quantum computing firms.

content.title: IBM buys HRL Laboratories in shift to two-track quantum computing strategy
content.summary: IBM has agreed to buy HRL Laboratories, a private quantum computing research lab jointly owned by Boeing Co and General Motors, the ‌company said on Thursday, adding a second pillar to IBM's quantum computing efforts.  IBM has been racing ‌against Alphabet's Google, Microsoft and others to create practical quantum machines that can crack problems that would take conventional computers thousands ​of years to solve.  In May, U.S. President Donald Trump's administration said it would award $1 billion to IBM to set up a new company called Anderon in New Albany, New York, to serve as a chip factory for U.S. quantum computing firms.

headline: IBM to Acquire HRL Laboratories to Power the Future of Quantum
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire HRL Laboratories, LLC (HRL), a flagship research and development institution. HRL is a private company jointly owned by Boeing and General Motors. Both Boeing and GM will continue to partner with IBM on quantum applications and advanced technology development following the transaction.

content.title: IBM to Acquire HRL Laboratories to Power the Future of Quantum

headline: Boeing beats Airbus with 173 plane orders at Farnborough Airshow
summary: Investing.com -- Boeing secured 173 orders at the Farnborough Airshow this week, edging ahead of Airbus which booked 154 jets, as planemakers continue to navigate ongoing supply chain constraints and work through record order backlogs.

content.title: Boeing beats Airbus with 173 plane orders at Farnborough Airshow
content.summary: Investing.com -- Boeing secured 173 orders at the Farnborough Airshow this week, edging ahead of Airbus which booked 154 jets, as planemakers continue to navigate ongoing supply chain constraints and work through record order backlogs.

headline: National Airlines Orders More GE Aerospace CF6 and GE90 Engines
summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) announced today that National Airlines has committed to purchase one GE90-110B and six CF6-80C2 engines to power their Boeing 777F/747F cargo airplanes.

content.title: National Airlines Orders More GE Aerospace CF6 and GE90 Engines

headline: Lockheed Martin Rockets 10%, RTX Jumps 7% on Beat-and-Raise Quarters and Record Backlogs
summary: While the broader market sank Thursday morning, two defense giants defied the selloff with blowout quarters and backlogs that shattered records, raising a pointed question about how much runway remains for investors who missed the initial pop.

headline: As Analysts Bet on Boeing Turnaround, Retail Investors Fixate on One Uncomfortable Fact
summary: Wall Street analysts are piling into Boeing with bullish price targets while Reddit investors stare at the same quarterly filing and walk away unconvinced. The gap between institutional optimism and retail skepticism comes down to one number that keeps resurfacing in every thread.

content.title: As Analysts Bet on Boeing Turnaround, Retail Investors Fixate on One Uncomfortable Fact
content.summary: Wall Street analysts are piling into Boeing with bullish price targets while Reddit investors stare at the same quarterly filing and walk away unconvinced. The gap between institutional optimism and retail skepticism comes down to one number that keeps resurfacing in every thread.

headline: Airbus, Boeing fly in different directions at Farnborough
summary: Airbus and Boeing presented differing outlooks for their commercial aircraft in coming years, as the aviation sector gathered near London for this week's Farnborough airshow. "From a financial perspective, it is driven by production rates," Stephanie Pope, head of Boeing Commercial Airplanes, said at Farnborough.

headline: How a St. Louis-based hub aims to fill the manufacturing workforce gap
summary: The Advanced Manufacturing Innovation Center–St. Louis is opening a facility in Q1 of 2027 and will be modeled after a U.K.-based training center that Boeing co-founded.
